messages.content: # Here is how to fix *Error 0xc000007b - slimdx.dll could not be found*

## Step 1
> Verify your game on Steam
> Steam > Assetto Corsa > Right Click > Properties > Installed > Files > Verify integrity of Game files

## Step 2
> **Start the game in your steam library** (You may need to uninstall CSP)
> Once in the game menu, close it

## Step 3 
> **Update Windows and the drivers**
> Download the Content Manager requirements.
> - [**DirectX End-User Runtime Web**](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/download/details.aspx?id=35)
> - [**DirectX End-User Runtimes June 2010**](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/download/details.aspx?id=8109)
> - [**Visual C++ Redistributable for Visual Studio 2015 | x86 version**](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/download/details.aspx?id=48145)
> - [**.Net Framework 4.8.1**](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/en-us/download/dotnet-framework/net481)

# Step 4
> Restart your PC and play
